summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of design contrast improvements across all client and developer pages. Successfully verified and fixed color scheme updates for better readability and visual separation.

design_issues.issue: Background colors not updated to match design specification
design_issues.fix_applied: Updated sidebar background from #08080D to #16161D and main background from #05050A to #0D0D12

passed_tests: Developer Dashboard loads with correct contrast colors (#0D0D12 background, #16161D sidebar)
Developer Work Board displays Kanban columns with proper separation and visibility
Developer Assignments page loads correctly with improved contrast
Developer Performance page displays stats cards with #1A1A23 background
Client Dashboard loads with updated contrast colors
Client Projects page displays project cards with proper visibility
Client Support page loads correctly with improved readability
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Sidebar separation is clear and visible on all pages
Cards stand out well against backgrounds with #1A1A23 color
Borders are more visible with white/10 opacity vs previous white/[0.06]
Demo access works for both client and developer roles
All interactive elements are clickable and responsive
